title: Washi Addicts Unite
excerpt: As you all probably already know, I have been (suffering) enjoying this addiction for a few years now. The collection has grown quite vast, and I find great pleasure in using it on all kinds of projects. I got some…
body:
As you all probably already know, I have been (suffering) enjoying this addiction for a few years now. The collection has grown quite vast, and I find great pleasure in using it on all kinds of projects. I got some of the newest designs from one of my favorite online retailers and made this in my Martha Stewart notebook.

Freckled Fawn carries a delightful selection of washi tape, lace tape, glitter tape, stickies, doilies, and more. We are offering a reader discount of Free Shipping on a purchase of $10.00+. This code works for domestic and international customers. Simply enter the code "FreeTangerine" at checkout. The code must be entered at checkout. Please note that due to the high volume that free shipping promotions can bring, your order may take longer to ship. We thank you for your patience. 

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED: One lucky winner will be receiving a $25 gift card. Just leave a comment on this post describing your summer in 2 words. For a bonus entry, follow me on Instagram and use the hashtag #ffwashi on a photo of your washi collection or a project using any of your tapes. Free shipping offer & giveaway expires Friday the 13th at midnight. Have fun shopping!

UPDATED: Thanks so much for all your fun words describing your summer, and for posting the instagram photos. 

The winner is #76: 

Jessica Dougherty says: July 11, 2012 at 9:42 am (Edit) Family Fun!
